zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia於1158年出生在蘇格蘭培爾阿爾時，他的父親Malcolm De Atholl18歲，母親Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl36歲。他於1187年與Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl在蘇格蘭培爾培斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1211年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia于1158年出生在苏格兰培爾阿爾时，他的父亲Malcolm De Atholl18岁，母亲Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl36岁。他于1187年与Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl在苏格兰培爾培斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1211年在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia was born in 1158, in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, his father, Malcolm De Atholl, was 18 and his mother, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, was 36. He married Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl in 1187, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1211, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia est né en 1158, à Atholl, Perthshire, Écosse, son père, Malcolm De Atholl, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl en 1187, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1211, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia 1158 in Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm De Atholl 18 und seine Mutter Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl 36. Er hat 1187 in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1211 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia è nato il nel 1158 nel Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Malcolm De Atholl, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl nel 1187, nel Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1211, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholiaが1158年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアソルで生まれた時，父Malcolm De Athollは18歳，母Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Athollは36歳であった。1187年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでMargaret Comyn Countess Of Athollと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1211年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.Glenerochie, Adjoins Struan, Scotland: 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스 앤드 킨로스 스트루아
ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia(이)가 1158년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 앳홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm De Atholl(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1187년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1211년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia nasceu em 1158, em Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, seu pai, Malcolm De Atholl, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl em 1187, em Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1211, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia родился в 1158 г. в местности атолл, пиртшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Malcolm De Atholl было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl в 1187 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1211 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Atholia Third Earl of Atholia nació en 1158, en Atholl, Perthshire, Scotland, su papá, Malcolm De Atholl, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Margaret Comyn Countess Of Atholl en 1187, en Perth, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1211, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
